parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_key)::int FROM sessions WHERE connected_at >= $1::timestamptz AND (disconnected_at IS NULL OR disconnected_at >= $1::timestamptz)) AS sessions_active,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_key)::int FROM sessions WHERE connected_at >= $1::timestamptz) AS sessions_new,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes_in), 0)::bigint FROM sessions WHERE connected_at >= $1::timestamptz) AS bytes_in,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bytes_out), 0)::bigint FROM sessions WHERE connected_at >= $1::timestamptz) AS bytes_out,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM security_events WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz) AS events_total,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM security_events WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz AND severity = 'high') AS events_high,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM security_events WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz AND severity = 'medium') AS events_medium,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM security_events WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz AND severity = 'critical') AS events_critical,
  (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM anomalies WHERE resolved = FALSE) AS anomalies_open,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) FROM (
    SELECT source_ip, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt FROM security_events
    WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz
    GROUP BY source_ip ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5
  ) t) AS top_source_ips,
  (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) FROM (
    SELECT event_type, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt FROM security_events
    WHERE detected_at >= $1::timestamptz
    GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5
  ) t) AS top_event_types;

INSERT INTO pulse_reports (
  period_start, period_end,
  sessions_active, sessions_new, bytes_in, bytes_out,
  events_total, events_high, events_medium, events_critical,
  top_source_ips, top_event_types,
  anomalies_open,
  summary, important, reason,
  raw_payload, raw_claude_response,
  model_used, input_tokens, output_tokens
) VALUES (
  $1::timestamptz, $2::timestamptz,
  $3::int, $4::int, $5::bigint, $6::bigint,
  $7::int, $8::int, $9::int, $10::int,
  $11::jsonb, $12::jsonb,
  $13::int,
  $14, $15::boolean, $16,
  $17::jsonb, $18::jsonb,
  $19, $20::int, $21::int
) RETURNING id;

SELECT id, memory_type, title, content, importance, created_at,
       ROUND((1 - (embedding <=> $1::vector))::numeric, 4) AS similarity
FROM memories
WHERE (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW())
  AND CARDINALITY(string_to_array(TRIM(BOTH '[]' FROM $1), ',')) > 0
ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector
LIMIT 3;
